name: §dSnowman
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Fight alongside your pet Snowman!

§7Damage: §c[Damage]
§7Strength: §c25
§7Crit Damage: §925%

§6Blizzard
§7Enemies within §a16 §7blocks are slowed
§7by §a25% §7and deal §a10% §7less damage.

§6Frostbite
§7Your freezing aura slows enemy
§7attacks causing you to take §a10%
§7reduced damage

§6Snow Cannon
§7Shoots a snowball towards an enemy
§7when you attack dealing §a20% §7of
§7your last dealt melee damage,
§7capped at §f200,000§7. §8(1s cooldown)

§6Ouch!
§7Your snowballs have §a50% §7chance of
§7dealing §cdouble §7damage!

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§d§lMYTHIC

variants.name: Cookie Sandwich Snowman Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aSnowman§7 pets.

§aThis skin adapts to the day-night
§acycle!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
